query:
SELECT
                p.id AS "user_id!",
                p.username AS "username!",
                p.display_name,
                p.avatar_url,
                ub.created_at AS "blocked_at!"
               FROM user_blocks ub
               JOIN profiles p ON p.id = ub.blocked_id
               WHERE ub.blocker_id = $1
               ORDER BY ub.created_at DESC
